name: Irving Kittery (Bluecanoe Big Stop)
description: Full-service Irving truck stop just off I-95 Exit 2, the first stop over the New Hampshire line. Offers 24-hour diesel, CAT Scale, showers, laundry, a truck wash, restaurant/deli and trucker lounge.

name: Kennebunk Service Plaza (Northbound) (Maine Turnpike)
description: Mainline Maine Turnpike service plaza at Mile 25 northbound with Citgo gas/diesel, a convenience store, fast food (Burger King, Dunkin', Popeye's) and car/RV/truck parking.

name: Kennebunk Service Plaza (Southbound) (Maine Turnpike)
description: Mainline Maine Turnpike service plaza at Mile 25 southbound with Citgo gas/diesel, a 24-hour convenience store, fast food (Burger King, Dunkin', Sbarro) and car/RV/truck parking.

name: Gray Service Plaza (Maine Turnpike)
description: Northbound-only Maine Turnpike service plaza near Mile 59 with 24-hour Citgo gas/diesel, Burger King, a convenience store, restrooms and truck parking.

name: West Gardiner Service Plaza (Maine Turnpike)
description: Large service plaza at Mile 102 where the Maine Turnpike meets I-295 and Route 126, serving both directions. Offers 24-hour Citgo gas/diesel, Burger King, Dunkin', Popeye's, a convenience store, EV charging and truck parking.

name: Auburn Irving Big Stop (Circle K)
description: Irving/Circle K travel center at I-95 Exit 75 in the Lewiston-Auburn area with about 60 truck parking spaces, four diesel lanes, showers, laundry, ATM, a 24/7 store and a CAT Scale.

name: Crossroads Market
description: Independent truck stop / convenience store at I-95 Exit 75 with four diesel lanes, about 8 truck parking spaces, a trucker lounge, deli/pizza, Dunkin', Subway and a Chinese restaurant.

name: CAT Scale (Irving Kittery)
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Irving Kittery Big Stop just off I-95 Exit 2, the first weigh-your-load scale over the New Hampshire line.

name: CAT Scale (Auburn Irving Big Stop)
description: Certified CAT Scale (#1196) at the Irving/Circle K Big Stop at I-95 Exit 75 in the Lewiston-Auburn area.

name: Britewash Washbay
description: Truck and fleet wash bay in Kittery near the NH line offering tractor, tanker, RV/bus washes, trailer washouts, chassis flush and engine wash, plus mobile fleet washing across southern Maine.

name: Eco Detail Truck Wash and Washout
description: Semi-truck wash and trailer washout at the Irving Big Stop complex at I-95 Exit 75 in Auburn.

name: Service Tire Truck Centers (STTC) - Scarborough
description: Commercial truck tire center near I-95 Exit 42 offering medium/heavy-duty and OTR tires, truck alignment and 24-hour road service.

name: Goodyear Commercial Tire & Service Center - Scarborough
description: Commercial truck tire and service center near I-95 Exit 42 in Scarborough with 24/7 on-site fleet maintenance and emergency roadside tire repair.

name: Kittery Weigh Station (I-95)
description: Permanent Maine State Police fixed weigh and inspection station on I-95 near the New Hampshire line, with in-pavement weigh-in-motion sensors screening commercial trucks.

name: York Weigh Station (I-95)
description: Permanent Maine commercial-vehicle weigh and inspection station on I-95 in York, one of the state's four fixed I-95 weigh facilities.

name: Maine State Visitor Information Center - Kittery
description: Maine's southern-border welcome center/rest area on I-95 northbound near Mile 3, with 24-hour restrooms, a brochure lobby, vending, pet area and car/RV/truck parking.

name: West Gardiner Service Plaza Truck Parking (Maine Turnpike)
description: Dedicated truck parking at the West Gardiner service plaza (Mile 102), the large plaza where the Turnpike meets I-295 and Route 126, with fuel, food and restrooms on site.

name: Kennebunk Service Plaza Truck Parking (Maine Turnpike)
description: Truck parking at the Kennebunk northbound and southbound service plazas at Mile 25, both with fuel, fast food and restrooms.

name: Gray Service Plaza Truck Parking (Maine Turnpike)
description: Truck parking at the northbound Gray service plaza near Mile 59, with Citgo fuel, Burger King and restrooms.

name: Ray's Truck Service
description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing, recovery and in-shop/mobile truck and trailer repair based in Saco, serving I-95 and the Maine Turnpike from Portland to Portsmouth.

name: Northeast Technical Institute (NTI)
description: Accredited CDL truck-driver training school in Scarborough near I-95 Exit 42, offering 160-hour CDL-A and 80-hour CDL-B programs.

name: Central Maine Community College - CDL Training
description: Community college in Auburn near I-95 Exit 75 offering ELDT CDL-A tractor-trailer training completable in about 4-5 weeks.
